title: Daraar
desc: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Dhadkan
desc: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
desc: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: Khiladi
desc: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Khiladi
desc: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Drishyam
desc: When his daughter accidentally kills a man in self-defence, Georgekutty uses his film knowledge to cover it up. Even when the investigation catches up with them, Georgekutty looks out for his family.

title: Pyar Ki Kahani
desc: Ram, a peon, forms a close friendship with a man named Ravi and values his opinion. However, he is shocked when Ravi disapproves of his fiancée and gets more upset when he learns the reason why.
